name: Louise
text: Well I do not have the words to explain how grateful I am to have found such a caring, loving and knowledgeable dog minder. I have struggled to find an environment that was suitable with having a small and large dog, quite the odd combination, however, Linda put my mind at total ease with regular updates and lovely pictures/videos. As we all know, having fur babies and entrusting them to a new minder is always quite nerve wrecking for us humans. I can hand in heart say dogs speak for themselves, so much so on one collection day Co Co ran back to go with Linda😂 that’s all the confirmation I needed! I could not find the right words to recommend Linda for the service she provides as I don’t believe it exists any where else. Please any one looking for a day minder/holiday stay don’t go to anyone else this is a beautiful caring doggy retreat for them. So we can be at peace while they are enjoying themselves. Thank you agin Linda, see you soon ❤️❤️❤️
